title: Missing boards from Private Bundle
excerpt: Hey everyone, is anyone else missing boards from their homepage? I had a handful of boards that were in my Private bundle, and they are all missing. But the ones that I have shared with colleagues they can still see but …

posts.author: Creative_Mamm_Al (Alex)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone, is anyone else missing boards from their homepage? I had a handful of boards that were in my Private bundle, and they are all missing. But the ones that I have shared with colleagues they can still see but they can’t share back with me.

Any thoughts or suggestions?

Thanks!

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Creative_Mamm_Al,

Sounds like this is due to our new unified board list: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360005655299-The-new-and-unified-boards-list?abcb=35904

We changed the sections in the left pane so that now you can add all types of boards into the same folders. The folder structure will therefore no longer be the same for your shareable and private boards.

You should still have access though to the private boards you were subscribed to. Can you send us an email to support@monday.com so we can troubleshoot this as quickly as possible?

Thanks

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Julia-monday.com Good morning,
there is no plans on erase the old board list no?
im very comfortable on the old one…
thanks

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml: You can switch back for now to the old one but we will eventually move everyone to the unified board list as it fits in better with our vision of the platform!
